lore.story: Hailing from House Paxley, he is an elegant, mysterious, and bizarre artist whose split soul has fused with his camera.

skill.name: Platinum Snap
skill.description:
Marcel's split soul, <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font>, enters the camera to freeze the moment. Marcel's Basic Attacks deal 50<font color="fba51f"> (+40% Total Physical Attack)</font><font color="62f8fe">(+40% Total Magic Defense)</font><font color="fba51f"><1065 0.4></font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> but cannot Crit. He cannot benefit from extra Attack Speed. Extra HP is converted into 1.5% Hybrid Defense.

<font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> automatically snaps photos of enemy heroes near Marcel, causing a brief frozen moment and dealing <font color="ffe63c">True Damage</font> equal to 5%+20 of their Max HP (can trigger Attack Effects). It also grants a shield of the same value to Marcel and a nearby allied hero. This effect has a 12s cooldown per target (each Basic Attack by Marcel reduces that target's cooldown by 1s).

skill.name: Framed Moment
skill.description: <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> focuses on an area around Marcel, slowing enemy heroes in range by 20%. After 2.5s, he completes the shot, dealing 400<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Total Physical Attack)</font><font color="62f8fe">(+100% Total Magic Defense)</font><font color="fba51f"><1065 1></font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies within range and immobilizing them for 1s.

skill.name: Tracking Shot
skill.description:
Artist inspiration time! Marcel enters the <font color="a6aafb">Tracking Haste</font> state for 3s, gaining 15% Movement Speed. This bonus increases to 75% when moving toward an enemy hero.

<font color="a6aafb">Use Again</font>: Marcel dashes in the target direction, leaving a framing phantom behind. If <font color="a6aafb">Framed Moment</font> is active, <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> remains at the original location to continue shooting.

skill.name: Golden Hour
skill.description:
Marcel and <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> perform a joint shoot. After a short delay, Clemar takes a wide-angle shot of a designated area for 3s. During this time, Marcel enters the <font color="a6aafb">Tracking Haste</font> state while inside the area. All other units in the area are put into a frozen moment and are immune to all effects except from Marcel. All ranged Basic Attacks and projectiles are also frozen and will resolve after a delay.

Golden Hour resets the cooldown of <font color="a6aafb">Platinum Snap</font> for each enemy hero.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, Marcel should activate his 2nd Skill, followed by his 1st Skill. Run into the enemy's formation, then use the 2nd Skill again to dash away and drop his 1st Skill on top of them. Once the enemies are immobilized, use his Ultimate.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: During the laning phase, use Marcel's 2nd Skill to run up to the enemy and cast his 1st Skill. While the enemy is immobilized, lay into them with Basic Attacks.
